versions.version_description: This chords is different with others but it works for me.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Taylor Swift
You Belong With Me
Fearless
2009
Submitted by: paramore_fans@yahoo.com

Key: [ch]F#[/ch]

Tuning: Standard EADGBe

Chords used:
[ch]F#[/ch] -  244322
[ch]C#[/ch] -  x46664
[ch]G#m[/ch] - 466444
[ch]B[/ch] -   x24442


Intro: [ch]F#[/ch]--[ch]B[/ch]-- x2


Verse 1:
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]
You're on the phone with [/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]C#[/ch]
your girlfriend she's upset[/tab]
She's going off about 
[tab]                   [ch]G#m[/ch]
something that you said [/tab]
Cause she doesn't get 
[tab]                [ch]B[/ch]
your humor like I do[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]
I'm in the room it's a [/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C#[/ch]
typical Tuesday night [/tab]
I'm listening to the kind 
[tab]                     [ch]G#m[/ch]
of music she doesn't like [/tab]
And she'll never know 
[tab]                [ch]B[/ch]
your story like I do [/tab]


Refrain 1:
[tab]    [ch]G#m[/ch]
But she wears short [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]B[/ch]
skirts I wear T-shirts [/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]
She's cheer captain and [/tab]
[tab][ch]C#[/ch]
I'm on the bleachers [/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
Dreaming about the day [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]B[/ch]
when you wake up and find[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C#[/ch]
That what you're looking for [/tab]
has been here the whole time 


Chorus 1:
[tab]             [ch]F#[/ch]
If you could see that I'm[/tab]
the one who understands you 
[tab][ch]C#[/ch]
Been here all along[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]G#m[/ch]
so why can't you see?[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]B[/ch]
You belong with me[/tab]
you belong with me


Interlude: F#--B-- x2


Verse 2:
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]
Walking the streets with[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]C#[/ch]
you and your worn out jeans [/tab]
I can't help thinking this
[tab]                   [ch]G#m[/ch]
is how it ought to be [/tab]
Laughing on a park bench
[tab]              [ch]B[/ch]
thinking to myself [/tab]
Hey isn't this easy 
[tab]    [ch]F#[/ch]
And you've got a smile that[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]C#[/ch]
could light up this whole town[/tab]
I haven't seen it in a while 
[tab]                      [ch]G#m[/ch]
since she brought you down [/tab]
You say you're fine I know
you better then that 
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
  Hey whatcha doing [/tab]
with a girl like that

[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
She wears high heels[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
I wear sneakers [/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]
Shes cheer captain and [/tab]
[tab][ch]C#[/ch]
I'm on the bleachers [/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
Dreaming about the day [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]B[/ch]
when you wake up and find[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C#[/ch]
That what you're looking for [/tab]
has been here the whole time

[tab]             [ch]F#[/ch]
If you could see that I'm [/tab]
the one who understands you 
[tab][ch]C#[/ch]
Been here all along[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]G#m[/ch]
so why can't you see?[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]B[/ch]
You belong with me[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F#[/ch]
Standing by and waiting [/tab]
at your back door 
[tab][ch]C#[/ch]
All this time how could [/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G#m[/ch]
you not know baby [/tab]
[tab]                [ch]B[/ch]
You belong with me[/tab]
you belong with me 


Interlude: F#--C#--G#m--B--


Bridge:
Oh I remember you 
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
driving to my house[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]B[/ch]
In the middle of the night [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F#[/ch]
I'm the one who makes you laugh [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C#[/ch]
When you know you're about to cry [/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G#m[/ch]
And I know your favorite songs [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]B[/ch]
And you tell me about your dreams [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F#[/ch]
Think I know where you belong [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C#[/ch](hold)
Think I know it's with me[/tab]
